creator: piokud84@gmail.com
text:
I tryed to compile OpenJDK6 one more time after ports tree update, i got the same error, but i noticet that there was one more (ignored) error during compilation and odd optimization flans combo:

-O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -DCOMPILER2  -fno-rtti -fno-exceptions -pthread -fcheck-new -m64 -pipe -DCOMPILER2 -fPIC -fno-rtti -fno-exceptions -pthread -fcheck-new -m64 -pipe -O3 -fno-strict-aliasing -DVM_LITTLE_ENDIAN -D_LP64=1 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Werror -Wpointer-arith -Wconversion -Wsign-compare

My make.conf:

CPUTYPE=k8

WITHOUT_NOUVEAU=yes
WITH_LCD_FILTERING=yes

KERNCONF=DESKTOP-DEBUG

NO_CPU_CFLAGS=YES
NO_CPU_COPTFLAGS=YES

SUP_UPDATE=YES
SUP=            /usr/bin/csup
SUPFLAGS=       -g -L 2
SUPHOST=        cvsup.pl.FreeBSD.org
SUPFILE=        /usr/share/examples/cvsup/stable-supfile
DOCSUPFILE=     /usr/share/examples/cvsup/doc-supfile

PERL_VERSION=5.8.9

#FORCE_MAKE_JOBS=yes
MAKE_JOBS_NUMBER=6

# added by use.perl 2010-02-17 19:19:49
PERL_VERSION=5.8.9

Error after which compilation continues:

Making SA debugger back-end...
/usr/bin/gcc -Damd64 -D_GNU_SOURCE                   \
                    -m64 -shared -fPIC -fPIC     \
	           -iquote /usr/ports/java/openjdk6/work/hotspot/agent/src/os/bsd                                        \
	           -I../generated                                       \
	           -I/usr/local/diablo-jdk1.6.0/include                          \
	           -I/usr/local/diablo-jdk1.6.0/include/freebsd \
	           /usr/ports/java/openjdk6/work/hotspot/agent/src/os/bsd/salibelf.c /usr/ports/java/openjdk6/work/hotspot/agent/src/os/bsd/symtab.c /usr/ports/java/openjdk6/work/hotspot/agent/src/os/bsd/libproc_impl.c /usr/ports/java/openjdk6/work/hotspot/agent/src/os/bsd/ps_proc.c /usr/ports/java/openjdk6/work/hotspot/agent/src/os/bsd/ps_core.c /usr/ports/java/openjdk6/work/hotspot/agent/src/os/bsd/hsearch_r.c /usr/ports/java/openjdk6/work/hotspot/agent/src/os/bsd/BsdDebuggerLocal.c                                         \
	           -Xlinker --version-script=/usr/ports/java/openjdk6/work/hotspot/agent/src/os/bsd/mapfile                                         \
	                                              \
	           -o libsaproc.so                                                \
	           -lutil
lthread_db
gmake[6]: lthread_db: Command not found
gmake[6]: [libsaproc.so] Error 127 (ignored)
gmake[6]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/java/openjdk6/work/build/bsd-amd64/hotspot/outputdir/bsd_amd64_compiler2/product'
-- 
Piotrek <piokud84@gmail.com>
